data_source.note: Complete rebuild from SINGLE source. All values are raw API values without transformation.
data_source.secondary_prices: UEX Corp (uexcorp.space) — embedded in API responses as uex_prices

ships.json.description: Alle Vehicles (288 total, davon 262 mit Bewaffnung oder Combat-Rolle)
ships.json.note: Vollständiger Abzug aller Vehicles inkl. Nicht-Kampfschiffe. Armor als Damage-Multiplikatoren (z.B. 0.75 = 75% Schaden geht durch).

weapons.json.description: Alle Ship Weapons (WeaponGun) S1-S7 mit vollständigen Combat-Stats
weapons.json.note: Jede Waffe mit Detail-API-Abruf. DPS, Alpha, Penetration (base_distance), Projectile Speed, RPM, Heat, Ammo.

shields.json.note: HP, Regen, Absorption, Resistance, Distortion Shutdown.

powerplants.json.note: Power Output, EM Signatures, Thermal Management.

coolers.json.note: Cooling Output, Power Draw, IR/EM Signatures.

quantum-drives.json.note: Drive Speed, Spool Time, Fuel Cost, Calibration.

missiles.json.note: Damage, Tracking, Lock Time/Range, Speed, Explosion Radius.

meta.json.description: Diese Datei — Metadaten über den Datensatz

armor_model_note: Armor damage values are stored as MULTIPLIERS, not percentages. Example: physical=0.75 means 75% of physical damage passes through (25% reduction). energy=0.6 means 60% of energy damage passes through (40% reduction). This is the raw API representation.
